my friend Jay has an interview for a marketing director next week. I said "I'm rooting for you. You got this. I'm there for you." My brother too said "I support you. It's going to be ok. I've got your back." Jay's girlfriend has a geography exam the week after so she's busy with revision. I said "you're almost there. You got this." My brother also said "I believe in you." When her professor was tutoring her in geography he said "now you've got the hang of it. You're on the right track now. Keep up the good work. You're doing fine." Her tutor too said "that's coming along nicely. You're learning fast. You're getting better every day. Keep it up. You've almost mastered that." The other day jay was late because he got off at the wrong stop and had to wait for another train. I asked "how on earth did you miss your stop?" He said "I'm sorry. What can I say?" I complimented  him on his euphonium skills. He said "yes what can I say?" The current situation is very bad. I said "well yes what can I say?" Yesterday I was shocked when I saw a car crash in the street. He said "I can imagine" His girlfriend said "I'm sure you were"
